trigger.Name: trVaterlandPlaceSecret
trigger.script:
local gunlist = {"pktu01","storm01","pkt01","fly01","vulcan01","browning01"} local len = getn(gunlist)
for i=1,12 do --println("step"..i.."succesful") CreateBoxWithAffixGun(CVector(getPos("SecretPlace"..i.."_loc")), gunlist[exrandom(len)], random(0, 2)) end trigger:Deactivate()
